summary: Documents the de facto CSV format as an ABNF grammar: CRLF-delimited records of comma-separated fields, an optional header line, and double-quote enclosure for fields containing commas, quotes, or line breaks, with embedded quotes escaped by doubling. Registers the text/csv MIME type. Informational status; it is the reference grammar for interoperable CSV parsing and writing.
title: Common Format and MIME Type for Comma-Separated Values (CSV) Files
